description: Shopify API v2 migration: 'order_status' field values changed from uppercase enums (PAID, REFUNDED, CANCELLED) to lowercase (paid, refunded, cancelled). Two new values added: 'partially_refunded', 'pending_review'.
Exchange rate feed from external provider (OpenExchangeRates) failed to load rates for 'INR' and 'BRL' for 2026-06-11. Table has no rows for these currencies on this date.
SAP export file size increased ~4x (from ~50MB to ~210MB per export) due to new warehouse locations added in EMEA region going live.
Meta Ads API v21 added new optional fields 'creative_id' and 'creative_name' to the ad performance response payload.
No recent schema changes detected on this source.
No recent schema changes detected on this source.
